languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn twists a piston on his beard, lost in thought.{/n} "I thank you for the interesting discussion, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн задумчиво покручивает пистон на бороде.{/n} "Благодарю за интересную дискуссию, Вольный Торговец".
{n}Eogunn twists a piston on his beard, lost in thought.{/n} "I thank you for the interesting discussion, Rogue Trader."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн задумчиво покручивает пистон на бороде.{/n} "Благодарю за интересную дискуссию, Вольный Торговец".

{n}Eogunn twists a piston on his beard, lost in thought.{/n} "I thank you for the interesting discussion, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn mesa un pistón de su barba, perdido en sus pensamientos.{/n} «Le doy las gracias por esta interesante conversación, Comerciante».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn twists a piston on his beard, lost in thought.{/n} "I thank you for the interesting discussion, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn mesa un pistón de su barba, perdido en sus pensamientos.{/n} «Le doy las gracias por esta interesante conversación, Comerciante».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡捻着胡须里的活塞，陷入沉思。{/n}“感谢您那些精彩的论辩，行商浪人。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn twists a piston on his beard, lost in thought.{/n} "I thank you for the interesting discussion, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡捻着胡须里的活塞，陷入沉思。{/n}“感谢您那些精彩的论辩，行商浪人。”

languages.text: {n}Perdu dans ses pensées, Eogunn joue avec un piston de sa barbe.{/n} « Je vous remercie pour cette fascinante discussion, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn twists a piston on his beard, lost in thought.{/n} "I thank you for the interesting discussion, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: {n}Perdu dans ses pensées, Eogunn joue avec un piston de sa barbe.{/n} « Je vous remercie pour cette fascinante discussion, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn dreht gedankenverloren an einem Kolben in seinem Bart.{/n} "Ich danke Euch für die interessante Diskussion, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn twists a piston on his beard, lost in thought.{/n} "I thank you for the interesting discussion, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn dreht gedankenverloren an einem Kolben in seinem Bart.{/n} "Ich danke Euch für die interessante Diskussion, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."

languages.text: {n}エオガンはヒゲをピストンさせ、物思いにふける。{/n}「興味深い話をありがとう、ローグ・トレーダー。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn twists a piston on his beard, lost in thought.{/n} "I thank you for the interesting discussion, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンはヒゲをピストンさせ、物思いにふける。{/n}「興味深い話をありがとう、ローグ・トレーダー。」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, düşüncelere dalmış bir hâlde sakalındaki bir pistonu büküyor.{/n} "Bu ilginç tartışma için teşekkür ederim Hür Tacir."
